abstract.para: &cockpit; enables you to install and uninstall packages from a single web interface.

topic.para: The Packages tab monitors the software repositories configured on &productname; system and communicates with the PackageKit to manage updates, search packages, and integrate logs.

The list of available packages appear in the Packages tab and you can install or uninstall the packages. You can view the name, version number, and a short description of the package in this tab. If an update fails due to a conflict, the Packages tab shows the technical details in web interface so that you need not manually verify the /var/log/zypp/history.
To initiate zypper in the background and download the required packages and install the package, click the Install toggle button and click the Install button corresponding to the package.
To uninstall a package, click the Uninstall toggle button and then click the Uninstall button corresponding to the package and click OK to confirm uninstalling the package.
